title: Trello -> trello connector fitting + disconnect derived Tasks (F4)

implement.detail: git mv trello-data-source -> trello; apm.yml faculty connectors + provides connector:trello + connector catalog (lists/list_cards/create_card/move_card/archive_card/comment) + secret_scope + setup/verify; new uniform scripts/connector.mjs (--probe/catalog/call, scoped env, awaiting_connector); removed trello.py; library.json + ratings.json renamed; compositions.ts deriveTasks REMOVED (F4 disconnect), derivedTasks always undefined

test.detail: tests/connector-trello.test.ts (5): catalog, lists/create_card via mock fetch, awaiting_connector, unknown-action. seed.test trello assertions -> connector. validate-fitting fittings/seed/trello = 4/4 PASS. typecheck clean.
test.command: node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/validate-fitting.ts fittings/seed/trello && npx vitest run tests/connector-trello.test.ts tests/seed.test.ts

codexReview.detail: reviewed jointly with C2 (connector contract); 3 findings fixed incl. trello path-encoding + board guard; round-2 clean approve. See slices/C2 codexReview.

walkthrough.detail: connector actions exercised in the Z1 e2e proof
